tests.description: Users can download their completed analysis as a properly formatted Markdown file.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The download produces a file with the correct Markdown format
The Markdown file includes structured headings, confirming the analysis content was rendered correctly

tests.description: Users can download their completed analysis as a valid, fully-formed HTML file.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The download produces a file with the correct HTML format

test_coverage.verification_step: The downloaded file content contains '<html lang=' and '</html>'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The HTML file has a proper opening and closing structure, confirming it is a complete, valid web page

tests.test_name: JSON download contains complete analysis payload
tests.description: Users can download their completed analysis as a structured JSON file that includes framework metadata and all analyzed test data.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The download produces a file in JSON format

test_coverage.verification_step: The JSON shiftdoc metadata has framework 'bdd'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The file correctly identifies the analysis framework as BDD in its metadata

test_coverage.verification_step: The JSON has 1 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file contains the actual test analysis content and is not empty

tests.test_name: JSON download contains add-on sections when add-ons were selected
tests.description: When a user runs an analysis with optional add-ons such as Gap Analysis, those add-on results are included in the downloaded JSON file.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The download produces a file in JSON format
The Gap Analysis add-on results are present as a distinct section in the downloaded file, confirming add-on data is not lost during export
